steps.title: Rewrite the denominator
steps.content:
The denominator is a perfect square.
$$x^2+8x+16=(x+4)^2$$
So the equation becomes
$$\frac{1}{(x+4)^2}=9$$

steps.title: Choose the listed possible value
steps.content: The question asks for a possible value of $x+4$. The listed positive value from the two solutions is $\frac{1}{3}$. The answer is A.
